reviews.text: I decided to call David Chesley after reading a lot of reviews about his law firm, and I was not disappointed. He is utterly professional and reliable. He returned my initial inquiry immediately. He listened and asked a few questions about my case. I had hit and run case that most likely would have resulted in suspension of my license, which would have been unsustainable as a working mother. Mr. Chesley assured me that he had worked extensively on these types of cases and would do his best to amend the charge, which he did. The whole court appearance was over very quickly, and I was able to get on with my day. I never had been to court before, and I was comforted by Mr Chesley' s professional competence. I would hire him again and recommend him highly.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Salutations Ms. Sanderson,
What a comprehensive and thoughtful testimonial about the utterly professional and reliable service that began with an immediate response to that initial inquiry! Reading about how I listened carefully, asked pertinent questions about the hit and run case, and assured you based on extensive experience with these matters that I could amend the charge - which would have resulted in unsustainable license suspension for a working mother - truly demonstrates the life-changing impact effective legal representation can provide. I'm particularly moved by recognition of the quick court appearance that allowed you to get on with the day, and knowing that my professional competence comforted someone experiencing their first court appearance confirms exactly why we work so hard to make the legal process less intimidating for clients facing unfamiliar territory.
Most humbly,
David Chesley
Criminal Defense Lawyer Practicing Since 2005

reviews.text:
If you're looking for a civil attorney, look no further BracyHawkins Law is the team you want on your side. They did an exceptional job handling my case. After working with other attorneys who unfortunately dropped the ball, Allison, Jendayi, and Channing stepped in and truly turned things around. They were phenomenal and truly are a Big 3.

From start to finish, they kept me informed and involved in every aspect of my case. Their dedication and expertise resulted in a settlement that was twelve times greater than what my previous attorney had pursued.

The professionalism extended beyond the legal team. Every office visit was met with warmth and hospitality. The office staff Tavar and Jose, in particular made me feel welcome and part of the team.

I'm extremely pleased with how my case was handled and highly recommend BracyHawkins Law to anyone in need of outstanding legal representation.

Working with Bracy Hawkins Law was one of the best decisions I could have made. Throughout the process, their team was professional, responsive, and deeply committed to ensuring I felt informed and supported every step of the way.

They approached my case with care, clarity, and confidence—helping me navigate a difficult situation with a sense of security and empowerment. I truly appreciated their integrity, strategic thinking, and how seriously they took my concerns.

If you’re looking for a law firm that will advocate for you with skill and compassion, I highly recommend Bracy Hawkins.

I found the Bracy Hawkins Law Team to be very professional and knowledgeable.  Throughout the process, Ms. Bracy, Mr. Hawkins and Ms. Saada, handled me with care, listening to my concerns and keeping me informed on the status of my case.  We ended up settling the case, and I could not have been more grateful for their hard work.  If you are looking for a legal team that puts your needs first, them Bracy Hawkins is the firm for you.
- Kristina M. Dixon

THANK YOU, BRACY HAWKINS!!!
Where do I begin? I contacted Bracy Hawkins Law based on a referral from a trusted friend who spoke highly of Channing Hawkins. From the moment I spoke with him, I felt confident and knew I needed him to represent me. His confidence and legal experience were immediately apparent as soon as we spoke.

My case was a bit unique, as I am a proud transgender African American. It was incredibly important for me to find someone who not only understood the law but also how to effectively work with the LGBTQIA+ community. Bracy Hawkins Law did just that and made me feel safe throughout the entire process. Their team is on top of everything!

As we moved forward into the mediation process, I was introduced to Jendayi. No one, I repeat, no one is more understanding or capable of writing a mediation letter like this amazing angel. The team is lucky to have her--I truly believe they are a dynamic duo.

It was important for me to stay involved throughout the case, and every question I had was answered. Jose was also a great help, and I truly believe this firm & team is Elite.

Although I can't share the final outcome of my case, I can say that it was settled, and I was beyond pleased with the result. The entire process was seamless as best as it could have been, and I finally feel like I've closed this chapter of my life.

I am incredibly thankful to everyone who helped. I would recommend this firm over and over again to anyone in need of legal assistance, especially within the African American and LGBTQIA+ communities.

Once again, thank you so much to Channing and Jendayi for your expertise and hard work. Please don't hesitate to reach out--your life will change if you have a case because they will work tirelessly to make it happen. They promise and deliver. 🙏🏾🤍

I am writing to recommend Ms. Holcomb, whom I decided to work with based on a trusted senior attorney's advice. I have been consistently impressed with the legal services I've received. Her office is well-run, and I've found their communication and how quickly they respond to be outstanding.

Ms. Holcomb is straightforward and always on time. She also explains her legal strategies clearly. I especially value that she welcomes respectful input and pays close attention to my concerns. While the legal system has its challenges, she consistently strives to lessen any possible negative outcomes.

In short, Ms. Holcomb has a skilled support team that ensures prompt communication and availability. It's worth noting that her services are professional and involve a fee. Given her expertise and high demand, her rates reflect the quality, which I believe is a worthwhile investment.

One important piece of advice I would offer is to always be truthful with Ms. Holcomb and her staff, regardless of the situation. Honesty is crucial. She will also provide you with direct feedback if you are in the wrong, with the aim of helping you improve. I am very grateful for the support of Ms. Holcomb and her team, and I hope you experience the same high level of service.

reviews.text: Did a consultation about 2 wks ago, I agree with the review listed below by Kayla which prompted me to elaborate on my 1 star no comment review.. Joyce honey, if you are stressed, overwhelmed, and burned out, just say that, you don't have to talk down to people calling you to potentially pay you $6,000 in retainer.. I agree that not only was she rude and condescending but she's definitely a male sympathizer and makes it seem like you're the problem regardless of you having a restraining order on the person. I don't know anybody who will pay a $6,000 retainer to somebody that insults them without knowing the full story. Luckily rejecting this attorney redirected me to someone way better and I won't list them here because I don't want this review to be flagged but at least wanted this attorney to hear now twice that YTA (reddit speak). She even had the nerve to question me how I found her phone number like as if we're not in 2024 and Google doesn't exist. Clearly she's concerned about her reputation and knows that she has issues and she's clearly concerned about her money which is why she's coming off that way but you coming off that way is exactly why you're having money and review issues. Joyce you honestly gave me narcissist vibes and what you need to do is exactly what you're trying to tell female victims calling your office for help and that's to start looking at yourself. Victims aren't to blame and you blatantly tried to give me a lecture about looking at myself... I wasn't charged or convicted of abuse, he was... What is wrong with you? reviews.text: Nothing prepares you for the mess of a really bad injury that stops you from working and living your normal life. I was facing months of rehab and the big company on the other side was doing everything to say it was my fault. Hiring AA Accident Attorneys was the only thing that saved my family from going totally broke during that scary time. Their expertise scared the other side because they looked into every little detail and built a really strong case. I was shocked at how they handled all the tough rules without ever making me feel dumb or confused by lawyer talk. They took the whole heavy load off my back so I did not have to worry about a single thing except walking again. Every part of what they do is meant to protect the victim and hold the bad guys responsible. The best part was how fast they jumped in to stop the harassing letters and calls from the other side. They got me into a great clinic that I never could have paid for on my own. Everything was based on winning the case so I never had to pay out of my own pocket first. They really treat you like a human being instead of just a number on a page. If you are dealing with a life changing accident you need their help to get your life back on track. They are simply the best at what they do.

When you go up against big insurance companies you need a team that knows what they are doing. I learned this when adjusters kept trying to trick me into a bad deal. Calling this brand changed everything because their expertise is amazing. They put a stop to the annoying phone calls right away and fought hard. I walked away with enough money to cover all my lost wages and damages 💯
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the wonderful feedback! We are pleased to have been of service to you. Should you ever need our expert services again do not hesitate to contact us again!

If you ever have legal issues in San Bernardino County, do NOT rely on the Conflict Panel or Public Defender. Please call the Law Offices of Michael A. Scafiddi and ask for Chris Gardner — he is the real deal.

An old parole violation for my brother came up a few months ago, so we went to court to get it resolved. We explained to his appointed conflict-panel attorney that the issue happened during COVID and my brother had been released at that time. When we appeared in court, the judge simply called his name, said “parole violation,” and took him into custody with no bail. We were shocked.

We were given another court date 30 days later for sentencing. During those 30 days, I tried repeatedly to reach the public defender and was told to contact the same conflict-panel attorney — but his website was down, there was no email, and his voicemail was full. I could not reach him the entire month my brother sat in jail. At the next hearing, that same attorney told us the judge wanted to give my brother two years. We again explained that this all happened during COVID and there was clearly a mistake, but nothing changed — still no bail, still in custody.

I started calling attorneys all over San Bernardino. After days of getting nowhere, I finally found Chris Gardner — and everything changed. He listened to us, understood the facts, answered every call or called me back the same day, and responded quickly to texts and emails. I immediately knew we had found the right attorney.

When Chris showed up to court, it was obvious he was respected — everyone greeted him warmly. The conflict-panel attorney was still pushing for two years, but Chris got my brother released, the case terminated, and no probation.

Do not go to court unrepresented. Go with someone you can trust and who knows the system. Chris Gardner saved my brother two years of his life. A huge thank-you to Chris!

We apologize if you felt we were rude or condescending. That is certainly not our intent and will strive to do better.

To address your concerns, we note that your first contact with our office was when you came personally into our office to speak with an attorney immediately. Both attorneys were in court and thus no attorney was available to meet with you at that time. As with most offices, we require an appointment for in person meetings, so that we are available when you walk in.

Because your case was already filed, we were able to review your case prior to giving you a call. Most, if not all, of our consultations are done over the phone, and if the case is one where we can assist you, we set an in person meeting.

As for the fee that was quoted, the case is a very serious felony case and is already filed, post preliminary hearing and set for trial. As such, you would be retaining our services for trial. You were not quoted payments, as we normally do not accept payments on criminal cases.

We wish you the best and hope everything works out for you.

reviews.text:
I had no expectations when I called for a consult in July of this year since lemon law claims are known to be difficult and drawn out processes. However, Lemon Law Experts made it as easy as it could be and I am rid of my lemon and in a new vehicle.

Every step included detailed instructions and consisted simply of collecting/sending documents, signing the agreement from the manufacturer, and surrendering the vehicle. They kept expectations reasonable - stating they would try their hardest but not promising a result. Even if the claim had not been accepted, I would have felt they did everything that could have been done.

Great company, friendly staff, easy processes. If you are looking for someone to help you with your claim, this is who you should use.

reviews.text:
When my brand new Mercedes AMG started having issues and the dealer and manufacturer refused to take responsibility, I knew I was being given the runaround. Frustrated and unsure of what to do, I decided to look for a lemon law firm to help me. My case had tough facts, and after calling several firms who wouldn’t take my case, I finally found the Lemon Expert. They immediately stepped up to advocate for me.

Bobby Walker, the attorney who handled my case, was sharp, knowledgeable, and a shrewd negotiator. Despite facing numerous challenges throughout the process, Bobby never gave up. He invested the time and effort necessary to fight for the justice I deserved, and his determination paid off. Thanks to Bobby and the Lemon Law Expert team, I am now well-compensated for my ordeal, and I couldn’t be more grateful.

If you’re looking for a law firm that truly cares about its clients and will fight for your rights, I highly recommend Lemon Expert and Bobby Walker. They turned a stressful and frustrating situation into a victory, and for that, I am incredibly thankful!

First and foremost, I thank God for placing me with this amazing law firm. Mr. Gary Dordick took on my case when I felt completely hopeless, even knowing that I’m from the Central Valley, where it’s very conservative and it’s hard to win anything out here.
Michael Yepp was the attorney assigned to my case, and he was truly heaven-sent. Michael fought so hard for me and my family and never lost hope. He always answered every question my wife and I had and consistently went the extra mile — even spending hours on the phone just hearing me out. He became like family. Not only did he fight tirelessly for our case, but he genuinely cared. He would always ask how my wife, our two little girls, and I were doing.

His team, Maricruz and Ashley, were also incredible. They did an amazing job. Every time I had questions, they responded quickly and made sure I was getting the proper care. They always checked in on me and my family, which meant so much to us.
Just a week before trial — only days before Christmas — when it looked like going to trial was the only option, Michael and Chris traveled all the way to the Central Valley, to little Merced County, hours away from Los Angeles. They fought for me and ended up breaking the record for the largest settlement for a mild traumatic brain injury (MTBI) in Merced County history.
I have nothing but great things to say about Mr. Gary and his entire team. They didn’t have to take my case or travel all the way out here, but they fought for me until the very end.

Thank you all so much. My wife and kids are forever grateful.🙏🏽

Seeing that record-breaking result come through just in time for Christmas is exactly why the entire team do this work.

I learned about Esther Wang through the California Department of Aging Family Caregiver Resource Centers that provide free benefits to family caregivers. As Trustee of my mom’s estate, I retained Esther as my estate attorney in December, 2023, upon my mom’s passing. Fortunately, I also consulted with her a couple of months before my mom’s unexpected passing to review my mom’s estate documents.

Esther is a highly skilled professional who is extremely smart, knowledgeable, focused, ethical, caring, and organized. An added benefit of retaining Esther and her law firm is that she has an outstanding staff who are knowledgeable, respectful, and customer focused. Esther and her staff are role models for exceptional customer service and communication. Esther created and guided me to meet all the California statute requirements, beneficiary notifications, selling my mom’s house, and obtaining approval of the Final Trust Accounting and releases by the beneficiaries. Due to Esther’s knowledge and experience, she has developed “best practices” she implements and customizes to her clients’ goals.

Consider consulting and retaining Esther for all your estate needs. You will not be disappointed.

"Really...there are just no words to express our heart felt appreciation for the kindness, intergrity, and valuable guidance from Esther Wang and her team.
A mere, friendly conversation with a new neighbor turned our life around. One phone call to the Elder and Disability Law Firm, that was answered by the friendliest and most caring voice, turned into a scheduled very long conversation at no charge ( and no pressure to hire her), that basically changed my elderly 94 year old mother's life (and her children's lives) FOREVER!!
That may sound dramatic, but going from owing over $10,000 dollars A MONTH for my mom's care, to an affordable cost covered by her small monthly income was no small feat. Timing was everything and within weeks, something we were told time and again by many "professionals" was impossible, became a reality.. All because Esther really knows her stuff!!! Time and again I called her office in despair and was always met with positive attitudes, and more than that, ACTION.
This office always came through for us. We certainly had to do our part gathering information and getting it to her office, but with in a day or two we would have some kind of an answer, if not a resolution.
The main thing I would do differently would be to PLAN AHEAD. The average person can not KNOW all the ends and outs of the current laws, rules, and programs available to the elderly.
Trying to make knowledgeable informed decisions under stress is the worst.
Thank you so much Esther Wang for taking some of that pressure off, and for always calmly, answering my questions, fears, and concerns... which were many!

Bless you and your staff!
Denise V. Running Springs, California
It's been very nice thank you

Our family was in need of a professional service that provided a straight forward path.

I made a promise to my Mother, I would always take care of her.  That promise gets complicated when your loved one can no longer make their own decisions.  It is a tangle of health care needs, long-term care planning, financial responsibility, and always the worry, will the funds be there to meet their needs.  Conflicts can arise in families.The Elder and Disability Law firm with Esther Wang helped Mom lay out her wishes before her critical need occurred.  What a God send it was to have a Trust and Durable Power of Attorney in place.  Over and over again I turned to these forms to fulfill Mom's wishes and address her needs.   I work in health care. I understand the system, but could not have navigated it without a Health Care power of attorney.   Esther Wang is a professional. The Elder and Disability Law firm is there for me, even after my Mother's death, to help settle her affairs.  Thank you Esther and your staff.

STAY AWAY FROM THIS LAW FIRM

After giving this law firm a YEAR of second chances, I went to another firm. I fid not realize how horribly I had been treated until I finally found a helpful law firm. Second chances started from the very beginning. I stressed I preferred to stay away from a “Case Mill” (somewhere where I’m a number and they have a huge amount of cases which they handle in bulk). I also stressed I wanted a firm in my area so I wouldn’t have to travel for doctor visits or in case I had to go into the office for various reasons. I informed the person who did my intake I needed to be able to get in contact with either the attorney or their assistant for any additional issues. My first visit was in another county which I was assured it was a one time event and my attorney would be in Riverside. I was also given a cell phone number of someone I could contact any time. I NEVER could get ahold of anyone. When I finally received a response text, I was sent the WRONG information. My attorney ultimately transferred to San Diego. I also ultimately found out that NOTHING was done on my case in a YEAR! A year later my new attorney filed with the WC Board immediately. Something simple which should have been done immediately which was NEVER done. This firm has too many cases. If you are looking for help during this type of stressful situation this is NOT the firm for you. Look elsewhere.
reviews.ownerResponse:
To “Just M”,

I am so sorry and apologize for the service you received from our law firm and on my behalf, I am truly sorry for your unfortunate and bad experience with our personnel. I will immediately investigate and review this matter as soon as you are able to send me your full name to my email. We are unable to pull any person with the name of “Just M”. If you wish to contact me directly by telephone or email, that is perfectly fine. I will be waiting for your response and respond promptly. However, our law firm has in fact done a great deal of good and defended many clients in the last 25 years with many repeat clients due to the fact that we got excellent results for them. Just in the last 30 days, we were able to prevail in court and get a client all of his medical treatment and surgery approved by the court after fight against the “ruthless & mean”’ insurance company adjuster and their attorney. On another case, we were to settle our client’s personal injury case within 3 months and get her the maximum insurance policy of one-million dollars. This is only a few examples of many victories we obtain on a daily basis. Many of our clients come back to tell us how happy they are satisfied with the outcome of their cases.

On a work comp claim we just settled last week, we got $590,000.00 for our client who was excited and so happy for our diligence and efforts. Not every case is perfect and not everyone is always happy, but we strive to do our very best for each client. My father was injured at work and I saw him suffer while working when I was very young. That made me who I am. We strive to give our best to every client. In a prior work comp claim, a client received over $4,500,000.00 for his industrial and personal injury case that we handled. We take every complaint very serious.

reviews.text:
My sister’s case was a very complicated case. In my family many of us carry the PSEN 1 gene which is a form of Dominant Familial Early Onset Alzheimer’s and because of this she found herself in a very bad situation and had no say with her life and the hardships that followed.   We counseled with a few other Attorneys that really were not too sure how to handle her case.  We started with legal aid in Orange County but they were only able to start the processes.  It is difficult for my sister to speak due to her disability and I needed someone to speak on her behalf.  We were advised by the judge to seek represented by an Attorney or the judge was going to dismiss the case.  Diana had not seen her kids for at least 5 months and her soon to be ex-husband is a very difficult person who refused to work with me on visitations for her and the kids.  When we first met Attorney Linda Lindsey my sister and I drove home knowing that we were in good hands.  Throughout the whole ordeal Ms. Lindsey was informative, patient, kind and professional.   Ms. Lindsey prepared us, and gave us the confidence we needed when it came to family mediation and returned calls when we needed to speak to her.   In the end with me as her Guardian ad litem and Attorney Linda Lindsey by our side, Diana received what we had hoped for.  Diana now has regular visitations with her children and her ex-husband and I communicate via text.
Attorney Linda Lindsey was very fair with her fees.  She is very knowledgeable in family law and seems to work very well with the other Attorney which I feel is a plus. She keeps us informed so we are not in the dark.  Ms. Linda Lindsey knew exactly what needed to be done in my sisters’ case and was even willing to keep fighting for more visitation time.   Ms. Linda Lindsey took on a difficult case and made it a walk in the park for us.  I highly recommend her and if I need an attorney again, I would definitely call on Attorney Linda Lindsey.  We can never thank you enough for all you have done Ms. Lindsey, you are our hero.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for your kind and generous words. We are truly honored to have been able to support your sister and your family through such a challenging and complex case. It was a privilege to work with you both, and we’re thrilled to hear that we were able to help your sister achieve the outcomes she deserved.

At Lindsey Law, we are committed to not only providing legal expertise but also offering the compassion and dedication our clients need during difficult times. Your trust and feedback mean the world to us, and we are so glad we could make a difference for you and your sister.

Thank you again for your recommendation, it truly means everything to us. We’re always here for you, and we wish your family all the best.

My experience may not be common, yet I'll explain. I have never spoken to a single attorney. The attorney assigned to my case left the law firm and I received a letter to pursue alternative legal services. The assistant was the only person I was allowed to speak to. I had to fight every step of the way to get anything done. I had to fight to get testing done. I had to fight to get evidence of damage done from work injury. I handled my own case from the beginning and am now stuck in a contract that will ultimately still allow them to receive compensation. But the case isn't over and I will report this firm to the board and fight to ensure they don't receive a penny!!!! You don't care about people and you take on more clients than you can handle.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Ms. Mullin,

Our office is in Southern California. Unfortunately our attorney who had an office and was based out of Northern California is no longer with our firm. In the experience of our office it is best to have an attorney that is familiar with the court system where your case will venue in for optimal results. Our office will not be collecting a fee, we appreciate the interest in having our office represent you, and wish you best of luck.

Sincerely,

Kampf, Schiavone & Associates, A.P.C.

reviews.text:
I am currently working with Eagle Law Firm on my custody case, and I can honestly say that hiring Omar was one of the best decisions I’ve made during one of the most difficult times of my life.

Before finding them, I had to fire my previous attorney because she came to court completely unprepared and unfamiliar with my case. Sitting there and realizing your own attorney doesn’t fully understand your situation is incredibly unsettling. It was stressful, disheartening, and financially draining. I felt unheard and unsupported during one of the most important moments of my life — when everything that matters most was at stake.

Working with Omar has been a completely different experience. He came into court prepared, confident, and fully knowledgeable about my case from A to Z. That alone gave me a sense of peace and reassurance I hadn’t felt before. His representation is strong, strategic, and professional. You can tell he truly takes the time to understand his clients and their cases — not just collect a fee, but genuinely advocate for them.

Jocelyn is absolutely amazing. She is supportive, patient, and incredibly responsive. She takes the time to explain everything clearly, answers questions promptly, and ensures all filings are completed correctly and on time. During something as emotional and overwhelming as a custody case, that level of communication and care means everything.

Omar is honest and upfront about expectations. He does not overpromise — he tells you what he can realistically accomplish, what to expect, and then he delivers.

I am beyond grateful to have them on my team and will absolutely continue working with them. Having an attorney who is prepared, committed, and genuinely invested in your case is invaluable. I would confidently recommend Eagle Law Firm to anyone who needs knowledgeable, dedicated, and compassionate representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Sandra, I don't know what to say. I so appreciate you taking the time to leave this review. It brightened my day :) It's been a pleasure to be your attorney.

reviews.text:
I had an extremely bad and damaging experience with Eagle Law Firm, including Mr. Omar and his paralegal, Joselyn. I hired them for my divorce case, which also involved immigration matters making the case highly sensitive. From day one, communication was almost nonexistent. My calls, texts, and emails were consistently ignored, rarely answered even when I sent critical documents and evidence.

Their mishandling of my case amounts to serious professional negligence. Discovery responses were submitted with incorrect information, and a motion to compel was filed after the court’s 45-day deadline also with missing separate statement Because of their failure, my hearing was dismissed by the judge. This directly caused financial loss and severely compromised my case.

Despite paying thousands of dollars, I received no meaningful legal support. The only time they contacted me was to demand payment. When I requested accountability and a refund due to their mistakes, they refused to accept responsibility even after the judge dismissed the hearing. Instead, they acted as if they knew better than the court.

After I posted an honest review describing my experience, Mr. Omar contacted me and threatened legal action unless I removed it. Rather than addressing their errors or refunding my money, they attempted to intimidate me into silence. This conduct is completely unacceptable and unprofessional.

Due to their incompetence and lack of ethics, I was forced to change attorneys after four months, losing both time and money. Other reviews reflect the same pattern: once hired, communication stops.

I strongly warn anyone considering this firm—do not risk your case or your hard-earned money here. I will be filing a formal complaint with the California State Bar so this behavior (MALPRACTICE)can be properly investigated.
Omar is great and very generous with his time. He tells it like it is, even if you don’t want to hear it.

I am right this review literally a few seconds are speaking with Omar...I couldn't afford his fees unfortunately and I know every good lawyer does cost, however he answered alot of my questions over the phone that I need to know in an upcoming legal proceeding. The advice he gave me was very helpful and reassuring in itself  I'd definitely recommend him if you can afford it if not give him a call and speak with him for any questions that you made need farther clarification.

reviews.text: I was involved in a car accident in Modesto, California. I contacted Arellanez Legal a few days after the accident because the law firm was recommended to me by a friend. My case was handled by Michael Arellanez who is very professional and makes you feel like family. The insurance company claimed their driver was not at fault. This greatly upset me because I was rear ended at a stop light. I could not believe an insurance company would claim I was not injured. Michael explained that the case would need to be mediated. I had never been involved in a mediation and I was unsure what to expect. Michael was very professional and helped me resolve my case at mediation. I was very happy with the results and would highly recommend Arellanez Legal. Michael does a good job at explaining how cases are resolved.

When the insurance company started downplaying my injury I contacted Michael at Arellanez legal and I am so happy and thankful that I made that decision. Mr. Arellanez was relentless during negotiations with the insurance company, and in the end, he managed to get me way more money than I expected. I would recommend this firm to everyone, and I intend to use them every single time I have an issue.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello George, Thank you for sharing your feedback. While we cannot comment publicly on the private details of your case, we do believe that context and transparency are important.

In our initial and first attempt to speak with you by phone, our paralegal was verbally attacked with vulgar language and screamed at. The firm declined to represent you because of this verbal abuse and wished you luck finding representation elsewhere. We strive to provide superior representation, but not at the cost of abuse toward our staff members.

We feel it's important to state the context of our refusal to legally represent you, as 3 different team members were eventually verbally abused as we tried to assess your case.

Because your review does not reflect what took place, the truth is important, and it appears this is an attempt to damage our reputation. We wish you success with your case.

Testimonial for Attorney John Vega

When my marriage ended, my ex-husband took our children, ran, and tried to have me arrested. He used his job and connections to gain leverage, leaving me at the mercy of people who had to decide whether to believe me. He made false accusations that threatened my career, my future, and my relationship with my children.

A trusted source recommended Attorney John Vega, and from the start, I knew I was in capable hands. Mr. Vega carefully vetted my case, which told me he only takes on clients and causes he truly believes in. He stood with me as I fought tirelessly to clear my name and reunite with my children. He then represented me through my divorce, ensuring I received everything I was owed even in the face of further sabotage from my ex. Thanks to his dedication and skill, I was awarded more than half of my ex’s retirement.

Because of Mr. Vega’s representation, I not only rebuilt my life, but I found my calling. I went on to attend law school, graduate, and begin a new chapter with my children thriving by my side. One is now in college, and our lives are filled with hope and promise.

Thank you, Mr. Vega. You will always have my deepest gratitude.

We stumbled into what we believe to be county corruption and incompetence regarding the placement of two foster children in our care. At that time we had two pairs of foster siblings in two different courtrooms, so we asked a key individual in each courtroom for a list of attorney referrals. John Vega was the only attorney on both lists. We felt good about Mr. Vega from the initial consultation. Mr. Vega gave us a very realistic idea of what to expect, and we knew from the beginning it would be an uphill battle. We had NO idea how brutal the county would become after we questioned their plan for the children in our care. Mr. Vega provided calmness, stability and strength in the middle of a pretty heated battle with the county. His knowledge of the law and processes exceeded those of anyone else in the courtroom, and he regularly had to correct what was being demanded by others in the courtroom. Mr. Vega and his staff continually filed the many important and necessary documents with the court, and we were always well prepared when walking into the courtroom. We are now nearing the end of the adoption process for the children in our care, and we cannot thank enough Mr. Vega and his wonderful staff for all they did to bring us to this point! Highly recommended!

Atty John N Vega was highly recommended to me by a Social Worker. He's laid back and soft spoken. One would think he's not paying attention to what you're saying. Don't get it twisted, he's hanging on to your every word while strategizing what angle to present your case. Atty Vega is a silent killer! He's for the people give him your truth and he'll take you to the finish line. I would proudly refer Atty Vega to anyone. Everyone in the office treated  me with kindness and listen when I needed to vent. Trust and believe there were many times I questioned why me. A few times Mirella has talked me of the ledge ....LoL

Atty Vega I appreciate you and your staff!!!!

Can't express all that Mr. vega and his office did. He was always honest, and caring to the situation. His reputation definitely was felt strong at every hearing. Thank you again Mr. vega for all your help.

Attorney Vega did a great job taking care of our guardianship case. Everything went smoothly with no issues.

They make you feel like family. 100% recommended Attorney John Vega and his staff.

I can’t thank Mr. Vega enough for everything they did in handling my child guardianship case. From the very beginning, they were compassionate, professional, and truly listened to my concerns. They explained every step of the process in clear terms, always kept me updated, and made sure I felt supported throughout such an emotional time.

What stood out most was their dedication — they treated my case like it truly mattered, not just another file. Their knowledge of family law, attention to detail, and courtroom presence gave me so much confidence. Thanks to their hard work and guidance, we reached the best possible outcome for my child, and I’ll always be grateful.

If you’re looking for an attorney who genuinely cares, fights for you, and delivers results, I highly recommend Mr. John Vega

We can never thank John and Mirella enough for their help during a nightmare of an ordeal. Mr. Vega and Mirella helped us maneuver through our case with professionalism and kindness. They were knowledgeable, experienced and very compassionate when we needed it the most. Thank you for everything.

Attorney at Law Mr. John Vega represented my family in one of the most devastating periods in our lives. Unexpectedly entered a hostile child custody battle. I began searching for help. I quickly found out he is highly respected in San Bernardino region. He is professional and honest which are important when dealing with sensitive personal matters. I highly recommend John Vega as he is a knowledgeable, kind and respectful person. He provided quality legal representation and was always available for any questions or concerns I had. In addition, the lovely hard working staff made the entire process easier to deal with since I was on edge and stressed all the time. I appreciated their availability and communication regarding my case and would highly recommend this team.

reviews.text: Do NOT use this scam lawyer, I should’ve checked the reviews. The lawyer was initially responsive, then ghosted after we paid, and never showed up to court on the court date.

I had a great experience with the Law Office of Vincent S. Hughes. They handled my driving ticket professionally and efficiently, and I didn’t have to go to court at all—they took care of everything on my behalf. The process was smooth and stress-free from start to finish.

Thanks to their expertise, my ticket was successfully resolved, and I couldn’t be more relieved. If you’re looking for a law office that’s reliable, responsive, and gets results, I highly recommend Vincent S. Hughes and his team

Vincent is knowledgeable, efficient, and professional. He handled my case with care and attention to detail and kept me informed throughout the process. I’m very satisfied with the outcome and would not hesitate to recommend them.

Liars!!!!! This law office is horrible!! Do not use them! The gentleman, (and I’m being nice) that took my call and was so happy to take my information & my money all the while praising Vincent for doing such a good job with traffic cases… Well, court date came and went, and No one Showed!! I had to call the county clerk after not hearing from this lawyer. She told me that no one showed up on my behalf. I had to ask for an extension myself! Worst part is, I spoke with that same “gentleman” a week prior about my upcoming case. Run as far as you can from these people. I called to ask for a refund, and all they did was take down my information, (which they already had) then duck my calls. I reported them to the Bar Association!  You don’t get to take people’s money & not show up to court.  Just unethical Scums!!! I don’t know how they got good reviews! If I could give a negative star I would!!

Do your homework and check in with the reviews that don't sit right...I sought this attorney's services only for him to take $5,000 of my money and not hearing a peep in nearly 2 months. I should have listened to the reviews alone on Yelp!  As soon as I sent a letter stating I had reported him to the CA BAR , filed a dispute with my bank, and threatened theft of funds charges with law enforcement I receive a call with a response that is all over the place and placing blame on other people. He asks to talk to me so I call him back and no answer. Very shortly after I receive a notice saying my refund has been processed. Thankfully I am getting my money back but not the time I lost for my case. I have had an attorney who wont stop calling to replenish my trust and barely make an effort and now this.Take your money elsewhere. If you were victimized by this lawyer or any lawyer for that matter, do not be afraid to speak up. Make the effort to report such actions. For all you know the next victim can be you.

Mr. Hughes and his office were highly professional and efficient. From start to finish, everything was handled with precision and confidence. His expertise was clear, and thanks to his experience and attention to detail, my case was resolved quickly and successfully. I highly recommend his office for anyone looking for knowledgeable, high-caliber representation.

Vincent is very knowledgeable ,professional. he guided us through the process. Was always available to speak with me. He got my son’s case dismissed. If we ever need representation again he will be my go to. I’m  very thankful for all his help

Vincent guided me through the entire litigation process with professionalism, keeping me informed at every step. He ultimately got the case dismissed. For top-notch representation, better call Vincent!

Will be coming back for anymore help with the law. This is a case by case so my situation will be different from yours but the customer service and expertise that Vincent provides is priceless.

Thanks!

I hired Mr Hughes for a speeding ticket I  received In July 2024 and he did get it rescheduled for November  19th 2024 I gave him a call a couple of days later to ask abt it he didn’t remember me finally able to confirm I hired him and he said he wuld follow up with me in about 14days. He never called I finally went into the courthouse in January and found out it was dropped.

I hired Vincent for my family court and DVRO I had a great experience.  I use to have problems with my past attorney’s not really following what I wanted to achieve in my hearing or getting the outcome I wanted. Vincent has really made this an easier experience for me helping me achieve the best outcome. Definitely recommend him for child custody and domestic orders he is the best.

Vincent Hughes is golden, they are extremely customer friendly and help clients separate feelings from facts in a caring way which leaves you feeling validated while moving in the proper direction to win your case. I'd bet my ass on Vincent Hughes everytime.
Who said it was me that was your client?? My friend was your client and like I said you did absolutely nothing for him worst possible lawyer he could have gotten
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello,

I have never had a client with this name. I also have checked my records an have had no contact with someone with this name.

reviews.text: Truly committed professional. Highly recommend him

I obtained Mr. Hughs as my representation for my child support case last year in July. Mr. Hughs was very professional and handled my case with ease. The result of my case was all the child support was handled by Mr. Hughs to a $0 payment a month. I recommend anyone looking for representation in family law or Child support services to contact Mr. Hughs, Excellent representation and very fair priced!

So grateful of attorney Hughes and his team. I had a 100+ mph case and was skeptical on getting an attorney. Attorney Hughes handled everything. I didn’t have to take a day off to attend the arraignment nor the trial. Even though the deputy was present for the trial my case was dismissed! 100% recommend!

I have not retained this attorney as of this moment and therefore cannot speak to his performance, but I will say that I called at 6:30 pm on a Sunday and he not only answered but provided realistic and true advice.  This on its own speaks more highly than most legal advocates I've experienced.  Regardless of what route I choose to take, he treated me like a person and didn't provide any fake promises.  I'm grateful for that.
Vincent is the man!! Thanks again

He did absolutely nothing for this case do not go to him for anything criminal!!! they don’t know what there doing big waste of money for somebody who’s barely getting by literally wanted to cry when I heard sentencing could of got that with a public defender!!!

Upon checking our lists of past and current clients, we have never had a Robert Fernandez as a client. Furthermore, we cannot guarantee results in any particular case, which is stated at the outset of our representation.

If you ever need assistance in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out.

reviews.text: Great lawyer.. highly recommended.. got my issue resolved quick..
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words and recommendation! I’m glad I could resolve your issue quickly. Your satisfaction is very important to me. If you ever need legal assistance again, feel free to contact me.

reviews.text: My advice, dont hire this man! He took $300 from me and said he was confident he could get my charges dismissed since I had a clean record. Fast forward 4 months and I have to pay a $200 fine and pay for traffic school on top of the $300 I already gave him. these were my options before I hired this lawyer! He didn't do anything for the $300 I gave him. Stay away!

He answered my calls and messages in a timely manner and kept me up to date on my court case. In the end he was able to get my case dismissed! Overall I'm very happy with him and would recommend him to anyone!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your wonderful review! I’m pleased to hear that you were happy with the communication and the outcome of your case. Getting your case dismissed was a great result, and I’m glad I could help. Your recommendation means a lot to me. If you need any legal assistance in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out.

reviews.text: Thanku for your amazing work
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words! I’m thrilled to hear that you were pleased with my work. It was a pleasure assisting you. If you ever need any legal help in the future, please feel free to contact me.

reviews.text:
I am pleased to see that others were able to get good service. Even though I did not receive good service or proper help, in my opinion, while using this firm, I hope that they can strive to give better service to all clients.

Not only was he not prepared in court the one day I asked him to go, he did not listen to me multiple times or my needs, he complained that I “called” too much even though he barely retuned any of my calls and missed multiple deadlines he set. If a client is going through an experience for the first time, then it is up to the attorney to make sure that the client not only feels comfortable, but understands was transpiring and provides a safe space for that client during the difficult experience by communicating properly.  He was affordable and did work with me on the price but while we were in court for the one day, he told me he would give me a full refund if he wasn’t able to assist me with the following court dates and he wasn’t able to assist me. I had to release him as my attorney for yelling at me on the phone, not listening to me multiple times, not meeting deadlines or returning calls in proper amount of time and  being unprepared while in court. He did not give me the full refund as he had stated he would. He made it a point to tell me he has other clients that had been waiting and in so many words made me feel as if they were more important.

I take this as a learning lesson that everyone should be super specific and picky in who they choose to represent them in difficult times. I am very much so an advocate for black owned and minority businesses which is why I chose to try and work with this firm.
Atty. Vincent Hughes was very detailed of what he has to do of my case and delivered what was promised.

reviews.text:
I have been engaged in a custody battle for 16 months now, and throughout this challenging journey, I have faced countless obstacles. The mother of my child has attempted to strip away all my rights, falsely accused me of domestic violence, and consistently portrayed a distorted image of me to the courts and anyone else involved.

Fortunately, I have had the unwavering support of Attorney Vincent Hughes by my side throughout this ordeal. Not only has he provided invaluable guidance, but he has also been a compassionate listener. His keen observation skills, especially within the courtroom, have proven instrumental. There were numerous instances where I contemplated one course of action, only for Vincent to advise me in a different direction. By effortlessly picking up on cues, he offers tactical strategies and solutions for the challenges ahead. One aspect I truly appreciate is that whenever we appear in court, Vincent Hughes is prepared. It is evident that he took the time to carefully listen and comprehend every detail I shared with him, as he eloquently articulates my words during opening and closing statements to the judge.

Thus far, every request made by the mother to take my son away has been denied, including the false domestic violence charge. We have one final trial appearance remaining, and I am confident that, with the support of God, it will also yield a favorable outcome.

During the storm of a custody battle, it becomes difficult to think rationally and clearly. That is precisely why you need someone with sound advice to guide you through to the other side. If you are seeking an authentic, compassionate individual who will thoroughly delve into your case, then Vincent Hughes is undoubtedly the right person for the job.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Jon,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience and write such a heartfelt review. I am truly grateful for your kind words and humbled by your trust in me throughout this challenging custody battle.

I understand how difficult and emotionally draining custody battles can be, especially when faced with false accusations and distorted portrayals. It has been an honor and privilege to support you during this ordeal, and I am glad that my guidance and compassion have made a positive impact on your journey.

I strive to provide not only legal knowledge and skill, but also empathetic listening, and I am glad that you found comfort in our conversations. Your trust in my observation skills and ability to offer tactical strategies has been instrumental in navigating the complexities of the courtroom in your particular case.

I am pleased to hear that our meticulous preparation for each court appearance has yielded positive results, with every request made by the other party being denied, including the false domestic violence allegations. Your confidence in the upcoming trial means a lot, and I share your optimism for a favorable outcome.

I wholeheartedly agree that during the storm of a custody battle, it is crucial to have someone by your side who can provide sound advice and guide you through the process. I am honored that you found me to be that person and appreciate your recommendation to others who may be seeking an authentic and compassionate attorney.

Thank you once again for your trust and for choosing me to represent you. It has been a privilege to advocate for your rights and help secure the best possible outcome for you and your child. If there is anything else I can assist you with, please do not hesitate to reach out.

Warm regards,

Vincent S. Hughes

reviews.text: Thank you for your amazing work. Called 4 or 5 lawyers before Vincent. Only took a couple minutes to know I was going with him and his office. I felt the true dedication to he work over all else.
reviews.ownerResponse:

Thank you so much for your fantastic review! I truly appreciate your kind words and the trust you placed in me and my team. It means a lot to know that you felt a genuine dedication to our work.

I understand that choosing the right attorney can be a daunting task, and I'm grateful that you reached out to our office. I'm glad that within just a couple of minutes, you felt confident in selecting me as your lawyer. It's essential to have that sense of trust and connection from the very beginning.

My team and I are committed to providing exceptional legal services and going above and beyond for our clients. Your acknowledgment of our dedication to our work is incredibly rewarding and motivates us to continue delivering the highest level of service.

Once again, thank you for your kind words and for choosing me as your attorney. If there's anything else we can assist you with, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're here to support you.

Warm regards,

Vincent S. Hughes

Staxx,

I truly appreciate your 5-star review. I'm grateful for the opportunity to serve as your lawyer and ensuring that you get the best possible outcome in your case!

Warmest Regards,

Vincent S. Hughes

Our lives came to an abrupt halt one cold day in January when my husband was involved in a highway five car accident. Unable to work and overwhelmed with every day back pain. I was unsure we would ever regain normalcy. I wondered if my husband would ever be the same again. Life with a spouse in every day pain and on top of that, unemployed, is extremely difficult. Desperate for answers and solutions, I engaged the services of Vetchtein Law Personal Injury.

As soon as we became in contact with Branden Brent at Vetchtein Law Personal Injury, everything was instantly more manageable. Branden quickly put us in communication with specialists to treat Miguel’s back injuries and took control of our insurance claim communication. He kept us constantly informed on details of our case and what to expect next. Branden would answer absolutely any questions we had.
Over the course of 9-10 months, Miguel went through all possible treatments and surgery and was able to return to work in December. Our case outcome was favorable and we were able to bounce back into our normal lives.

If it wasn’t for Branden’s expertise and attention to detail, none of this would have been possible. I highly recommend Vetchtein Law Personal Injury. I have no idea how our lives would have been restored without their services.

Christian and his firm in trial court against a self-represented party-- blew it.

Such subpoena would have the opposite effect, demonstrating how he didn't study the case; to his client's detriment and a dereliction of his duty.

His junior attorney committed the same error, stating they would subpoena records from a therapist--never happened.  Had the records been brought forward, they would have had the opposite impact.  Again, it was all showmanship and a lack of studying the case.

Their cross-examination throughout the trial was destitute. Their closing argument sounded like a laundry list.  They're not top-notch but they'll charge you as if they are.

At the end of the day, they're a weak firm that prey
on people who are desperate and don't know any better.  Christian and company take cases in volume to make money, use showmanship, and their legal representation is broke.

reviews.text:
Why did I hire RP Law Group? I had many choices and I interviewed many attorneys - even worked with a couple of them before RP Law Group. The biggest problem is that workers' compensation attorneys are not accessible. They will never call you back or work on your case. This guy is unique. They have staff, but if you want to make an appointment to see him you can within the week. I tested that first hand. He is aggressive. That is another thing I like. He understands the injuries. My case was late to file but he still took it. He said he will make lemonade out of lemons. And he did. I 100% suggest this attorney. However, I would like to inform everyone to report their injuries and make sure you have a text or email as proof as the employer always denies that you reported an injury. When you go to the doctor RP law Group can only do so much. You have to fight for what you want. You have to tell all body parts and be honest. RP Law Group really helped me through this.
I DID NOT WRITE THIS ABOVE. READ BELOW!!!
You guys want a real review here you go. The review above was not written by me the client. Once my case was settled Raj asked me to go into google and asked to see my phone. As soon as he had my phone he sent a message to my phone copied and pasted it and posted it as the review above then deleted the txt. It was very fast and sneaky. He had a txt/review ready to go. I never wrote a review yet  received an email thanking me for the review. I mean come on, he made the review seem like instructions to prepare people before coming in. Just read it again real quick. Once I read it I was absolutely furious.  I am not really sure any of the reviews they have are real. I regret not going with another law firm. I did speak to another law firm prior to RP law group but it was in LA and stupid me settled to something closer. I will say that the LA law firm I spoke to was pretty crappy as well. I have come to see that all lawyers are scammers as well. Or just don’t care enough. I went with Raj because yes he is very smart and aggressive, but did not work well with me. He was very rude and condescending at times. On the day of my deposition he was handling another case on his phone at the same time. His focus was not all on my case. Aside from that he did not work with me before my case, he made me lie and say that we “prepared for the case” for at least and hour and fifteen minutes, we did not. When I asked him to ask for more money because I was not satisfied he said no. I wanted to be seen by a doctor as well before my case settled so it would be covered by the company but he also said no that we didn’t need it. Now I have to use the money I won, which I know is the point, but I could have saved some of it if Raj would have let them pay for at least one doctor visit. That being another thing, the company we went up against didn’t even bother fighting against us much at all. My injury was severe, traumatic, and had all the proof in the world, we could have fought them longer for more. I literally already had pictures, doctors notes, incident reports and so on. I feel like I did half the work myself.  My deposition lasted like 30 minutes, I am sure we could have doubled what we got. Raj was just not willing to work harder nor longer on my case but I was already in the process. If I would have dropped the case to go with someone else I would have had to pay for the services rendered. So I was stuck. With all that being said they did get the job done yes indeed. Raj is very aggressive and I know he could have done more. The only reason I am now updating  this review is because I received another email saying I have a reply to the supposed review I left. What surprise it’s RP law group thanking me for the review they wrote themselves through my phone. I guess they thought I wouldn’t notice. Once I saw that I went back to the anger that I had before about the initial review. This is why I am taking the time to update this. PLEASE READ IN FULL. I would not take the time to write this just to mess with anyone.

Let me tell you about all the ways Mr. Lugo & his associates completely failed my father in law, and how that led to him getting DETAINED BY ICE.

1. They sent in a representative, whose credentials should be questioned, to my father in law's LAST immigration interview to become a citizen, & he did NOTHING to help.
2. He showed up almost 30 minutes late, shoelaces &  tie untied, in a completely disheveled appearance. Then he had to audacity to have them wait LONGER because, "He needed a few moments in the bathroom to put himself together."
3. When asked by the interviewer simple questions, that he should have known about the case, the most he could provide were "I don't know," answers.
4. When my mother in law called his main attorney, (the one that didn't show up to his final interview,) he claimed that things could always come up, & he could not have guaranteed them to always be there.
5. My father in law was told to go make a copy of his ID, at the end of his interview. When he went to do that, that is where ICE agents were waiting for him. The firm representative that they sent, was no help AT ALL. He claimed that it was out of his hands, and all they could do was wait. Then ghosted my family & left the building.

DO NOT give this firm your money. They are unreliable, unprofessional, & untrustworthy. I understand that because of the recent change in the law that happened on 9/6/25, the process has become a lot more difficult. However, this does not excuse the pathetic excuse of legal support that they provided my father in law.
ESTAFADORES!!!

reviews.text: If you are on the fence about which law firm you want to represent you, I would absolutely choose Wallin & Klarich. If you need an attorney as I did, then odds are you aren’t trying to fight a parking ticket – so I recommend considering the value of your reputation and future. You also get what you pay for, so putting your reputation and future in the hands of a law firm is not like picking someone to cut your lawn. I prepared a spreadsheet of all the best law firms in southern California, and after asking friends and colleagues, looking at reviews and recommendations and experience, there was no doubt I was going with Wallin & Klarich. I am glad I did. From day one, I was reassured that they could handle my case successfully. They asked for every detail and guided me on what steps I should take and how they would be managing my case. I did my part, and we proceeded to go through the process. I found out the court system is a waiting game, and patience is your best friend. It’s also a game of chess and having a law firm that handled thousands of cases and decades of experience paid off. Wallin & Klarich was able to provide me the best resolution I could have asked for. I am extremely grateful for their perseverance and commitment to my case. There were several employees and attorneys who had been involved in my case, and I really appreciate the outstanding professionalism and efforts of each one. In particular, I would like to thank Mr. Carl Wong and Mr. Clinton Chan for providing incredible support and seeing my case through to fruition.

reviews.text: This review of Shouse Law Group is for a particular attorney; Criminal Defense Attorney John Murray. A couple of years ago I made some really horrible decisions and was facing multiple cases with charges like a DUI with a BAC over .20 and a HORRIBLE report to go along with it as well as another charge involving my beautiful 4 year old (at the time) son whom I was at the movies with and drunk. I was in jeopardy of losing my family, having supervised visitation with my son, a criminal record and most likely doing jail time. Honestly, when I met John, I didn’t walk out feeling “ok”.  Rather, I walked out knowing there was chance, albeit a slim chance, there was a chance we could make this happen. I hired John because he was honest. He never lied and tried to make me feel like everything was Mai Tai’s and Yatzy. He seemed sure of himself but reinforced that this wasn’t an easy case and the results, may be less than stellar. I appreciated that. That’s not the norm for lawyer’s and for over a year I was stressed and scared. I had no idea what was going on or what this lawyer I hired was doing!….I don’t know how he did it, but John was able to talk the DA and the Judge into consolidating the two cases AND THEN put me into military diversion!  At the end of the day John effectively made all of this disappear like it never happened. The service and outcome are well worth the fee. John saved me. He saved my family. He saved my relationship with my boy. I don’t know how he did it, but I’ll be forever in his debt.  I’m not sure many other attorneys would have had the same outcome for their client….simply put, if you have a tough case; an unbeatable case, in the San Bernardino Courthouse and especially if you’re a veteran, you NEED to Call John Murray. I promise you won’t be dissatisfied.

Well after 3 years in 2006 he went back to court for me,  had the courts  reduce the felony under section 17b to a  misdemeanor,  then  dismiss the case under section 1203.4. After it was all said and done I asked how much I owed him, he Replied "nothing, but I could donate to charity if I felt I owed him anything". reviews.text:
Why did I hire RP Law Group? I had many choices and I interviewed many attorneys - even worked with a couple of them before RP Law Group. The biggest problem is that workers' compensation attorneys are not accessible. They will never call you back or work on your case. This guy is unique. They have staff, but if you want to make an appointment to see him you can within the week. I tested that first hand. He is aggressive. That is another thing I like. He understands the injuries. My case was late to file but he still took it. He said he will make lemonade out of lemons. And he did. I 100% suggest this attorney. However, I would like to inform everyone to report their injuries and make sure you have a text or email as proof as the employer always denies that you reported an injury. When you go to the doctor RP law Group can only do so much. You have to fight for what you want. You have to tell all body parts and be honest. RP Law Group really helped me through this.
I DID NOT WRITE THIS ABOVE. READ BELOW!!!
You guys want a real review here you go. The review above was not written by me the client. Once my case was settled Raj asked me to go into google and asked to see my phone. As soon as he had my phone he sent a message to my phone copied and pasted it and posted it as the review above then deleted the txt. It was very fast and sneaky. He had a txt/review ready to go. I never wrote a review yet  received an email thanking me for the review. I mean come on, he made the review seem like instructions to prepare people before coming in. Just read it again real quick. Once I read it I was absolutely furious.  I am not really sure any of the reviews they have are real. I regret not going with another law firm. I did speak to another law firm prior to RP law group but it was in LA and stupid me settled to something closer. I will say that the LA law firm I spoke to was pretty crappy as well. I have come to see that all lawyers are scammers as well. Or just don’t care enough. I went with Raj because yes he is very smart and aggressive, but did not work well with me. He was very rude and condescending at times. On the day of my deposition he was handling another case on his phone at the same time. His focus was not all on my case. Aside from that he did not work with me before my case, he made me lie and say that we “prepared for the case” for at least and hour and fifteen minutes, we did not. When I asked him to ask for more money because I was not satisfied he said no. I wanted to be seen by a doctor as well before my case settled so it would be covered by the company but he also said no that we didn’t need it. Now I have to use the money I won, which I know is the point, but I could have saved some of it if Raj would have let them pay for at least one doctor visit. That being another thing, the company we went up against didn’t even bother fighting against us much at all. My injury was severe, traumatic, and had all the proof in the world, we could have fought them longer for more. I literally already had pictures, doctors notes, incident reports and so on. I feel like I did half the work myself.  My deposition lasted like 30 minutes, I am sure we could have doubled what we got. Raj was just not willing to work harder nor longer on my case but I was already in the process. If I would have dropped the case to go with someone else I would have had to pay for the services rendered. So I was stuck. With all that being said they did get the job done yes indeed. Raj is very aggressive and I know he could have done more. The only reason I am now updating  this review is because I received another email saying I have a reply to the supposed review I left. What surprise it’s RP law group thanking me for the review they wrote themselves through my phone. I guess they thought I wouldn’t notice. Once I saw that I went back to the anger that I had before about the initial review. This is why I am taking the time to update this. PLEASE READ IN FULL. I would not take the time to write this just to mess with anyone.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Miguel Ramos,
Thank you very much for taking the time to write a great review about our firm. RP Law Group, as a firm, is really happy to have had the opportunity to help you out with your case.

Dear Ms. Pedroza,
We do not have a record of ever consulting with you or doing any work for you. It is very unfair to place a rating when you have not used our services. Since you did not specify the reason you left such a rating, we cannot even address whatever issue it may have been. This does not help people who have urgent legal needs. reviews.text: I called and asked what they would charge to file a notice of default on a property.  They could not tell me prior to paying a $200 consultation fee.  I sent documents and specific questions prior to the consultation.  The attorney did not know the answers to my questions and apparently did not review my documents because he didn't know what was in them.  After 20 minutes of rambling about things I didn't care about, he told me he is more of a litigation attorney and not really what I need, but he will let me retain him to write a letter on my behalf at a whooping cost of $1,750!  He should have looked at my questions and documents  prior to the call and told me right away that he's not the right guy for me - and not charge a consultation fee for not knowing the answers to my questions.  It would have only taken him 5 minutes tops.
reviews.ownerResponse:
It is unfortunate that you did not choose to give us a 5-star rating because you did not receive the “simple” answer you were looking for or expecting. We will not refute your review point by point in order to preserve your confidentiality.

When most people schedule a consultation appointment with one of our attorneys, they realize they are making an investment of time and money in order to obtain a professional legal analysis of their situation.

Many people begin, believing they have a “simple” question or situation. In most legal situations, there are no “simple” answers, and the time involved for appropriate analysis will certainly take more than “5 minutes.”

Many times, a potential client may not know exactly what is needed or what is in their best interests in a given situation. Before our attorneys can advise what it would cost for certain services someone may request, first the attorney needs to assess whether or not the services requested are appropriate. To do otherwise would be irresponsible. It is essential that the person’s legal position be fully analyzed to be able to determine legal options in that situation. Considerations may include jurisdictional issues, such as which state has jurisdiction, the enforceability of an agreement, and possible ambiguity in the language of the underlying documents. Many times, these issues cannot be resolved without interpretation by a judge in a court of law.

Our receptionist and legal assistants cannot evaluate someone’s legal options or quote a retaining fee for any specific service. What they can do is make someone an appointment with an experienced, legally educated and respected attorney to make a full evaluation. If documents are sent in ahead of the consultation, it is so the attorney can refer to them during the consultation in order to provide advice specific to those documents.

We hope other potential clients will realize that an attorney needs to get certain information in order to provide a full evaluation.
Thank you so much for posting your 5 star rating for Granowitz White & Weber!

Thank you for our 5 star rating!
Granowitz White & Weber
Attorneys and Staff

This team of angels took everything off my shoulders. I had no more worries about how to proceed. reviews.ownerResponse:
Good Morning John, I dont show you in my database as a client under the name of John Jacob but in reply to your assertion that we are not committed to our clients is totally untrue. Trial is the worst option 90% of the time in a workers compensation case since the future medical stays open at the end of the trial and the client only receives small biweekly payments till the amount of the award is paid in full. The issue of the value of the injury itself is rather cut and dry based upon the doctors reporting of the disability involved and your attorney and the courts use the same rating system making trial on that issue unnecessary. Generally the only cases that go to trial is where the Employer has challenged the truthfulness of the alleged injury or the doctors assessment of apportionment to non-industrial factors.
As you must realize the attorney gets paid based upon the gross settlement and so it stands to reason he is not about to leave any money on the table so he and the client win.
No case is ever settled without the clients approval, this is not a back room deal done in the dark behind anyone's back. Every settlement is done with both the client's and the JUDGE"S approval for adequacy.
Please be so honorable to reconsider your most horrible review which truly hurst myself and my family.

reviews.text:
I brought Mr Augustine into one of the most ugly complicated cases you see in family law. I had multiple attorneys turn me down because it was too complicated and ugly. Cantor Law in Arizona, arguably the most elite family law firm said it wasn’t winnable. They told me I was being treating unfairly, that the judge wasn’t following the law, but I just had to accept it. Mr. Augustine thought otherwise. Not only is he the best value in area, he’s the only attorney that actually fought for my best interests instead of just saying he would. I could hear it through the conviction in his voice when he argued on my behalf. I saw it when he replied to my email promptly and even late at night when his day schedule was full. That’s not typical of attorneys and I’d know, he’s my 5th one.  My fight is far from over but I have faith that if any attorney can steer this ship away from the iceberg, it’s Stacy Augustine, esquire. Don’t waste your time or money on other attorneys in this area.

Update: My case has honestly felt like Anderson Silva vs. Chael Sonnen — four and a half rounds of getting slammed, smothered, and outscored by pure chaos. Every time I looked up, life was dropping elbows and the judges were already filling out the scorecards against me. Through all of that, Mr. Augustine stayed calm, didn’t panic, and kept telling me, “Relax, we’re still in this. Breathe.” Meanwhile Stacy was basically my cornerman between rounds, handing me the metaphorical ice pack, saying, “You’re fine, get back in there.”

And somehow, right when everyone thought it was over, we found the opening.
We locked up the legal triangle choke.
And suddenly the whole fight flipped.

If you need a team that won’t tap out — even when your case looks like a highlight reel of you getting punched in the soul — Stacy is the attorney you want in your corner.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Matt. Trust me, we are not done yet. At the end of the day, the Courts must follow the law. The difference between me and the other lawyers is that i truly believe you. False allegations are on the rise. I'm losing count on the times I have exposed liars in Court and had them held accountable. We will stand for the truth. We are on the right side of justice.

I am happy to say Shaffer Cormell and his team were successful in my case. They operate a little differently from the competition.

With a lot of traffic attorneys, their approach is pretty similar. It’s almost always a gamble and heavily dependent on the judge as most of the time a CHP officer will show up if you decide to fight it. Nowadays, hoping the officer doesn’t show is like believing that Santa Claus is going to come down your chimney and give you presents on Christmas morning.. it’s just not happening. I have found it to be somewhat rare for a judge to accept a lesser plea or not-guilty verdict if an officer does arrive… but that is exactly what happened! One of the lawyers at Shaffer Cormell’s law firm appeared and was able to reach an outcome with no points for me. Clearly, they are doing something different and it is effective.

If you guys are ever in a bind in Southern California, I couldn’t recommend him enough.
