reviews.text:
** WON MY AT FAULT CASE **
Let me start by explaining my case. I was on the freeway when the car next to me swerved in my lane and causing us both to spin out . I hit the side railing twice and was knocked unconscious. I did wake up  but I wasn’t  alert enough  to  tell my statement. There were  TWO witnesses against me  . So In the police report I was deemed “at fault” in my accident .

I was in the hospital for 28 days , with fractures in three parts of my body and other serious injuries .i still continue therapy . I’m only 24 years old I work , live on my own and I’ve  NEVER been through this type of situation. I was lost , hurt and needed legal advice. I was referred to Rocky and Philip. I contacted them and told them the situation I needed A LOT OF help . With getting the police report , mailing off letters , my car insurance. they immediately took action while I was in the hospital.

They made the whole case  easy for me and took weight off of me  . Everything was CLEAR and straightforward. Any questions I had they answered. They WON MY AT FAULT CASE !!!!!! I was worried because the police report was so against me. But  they know what they’re doing . Just  be patient with them ! My case took under 2-3 months . These guys are truly the best. They’re Trustworthy and honest , they treat you like family and are understanding of your situation. They also went beyond with my car helping me with insurance that’s a PLUS !!! My car is paid off 💜💜
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your powerful story. We know how overwhelming it can be after such a serious accident, and we’re so glad Attorney Philip Rios, Rocky and our team could lift that weight off your shoulders and fight for the right outcome. We truly appreciate your trust in us and are proud to have helped you through such a difficult time.

I am appalled at the level of unprofessionalism displayed by Dahdah Law Firm. The communication I received from their office addressed me as “Dear Disciple of Christ,” which was both inappropriate and unsettling. The only way this law firm could have obtained that personal detail was by searching through my Facebook profile—a completely unnecessary and invasive act.

This kind of behavior raises serious concerns about their boundaries and professionalism. Rather than focusing on my case, it seems they invested time in snooping through my personal life to use it in correspondence. Such actions are not only irrelevant to legal matters but also reflect poorly on their judgment and ethics.

If you’re looking for a law firm that handles cases with professionalism and integrity, I strongly urge you to look elsewhere. My experience with Dahdah Law Firm was deeply disappointing and unnerving.

EDIT:
This response from DahDah Law Firm is misleading. Let me clarify: this firm did absolutely nothing to convince me to dismiss my case. It was the claims team from their client’s insurance company who reached out and persuaded me to act in good faith after explaining their client’s circumstances.

Throughout the entire process, this law firm demonstrated significant negligence and a lack of professionalism. From their inappropriate communication to their dismissive and condescending tone, they failed to meet even the most basic standards of conduct. My decision to dismiss the case was made out of consideration for their client’s situation, not because of any actions by this firm.

It’s important that the truth is reflected in this matter, and I stand by my review of their unprofessional behavior.
reviews.ownerResponse:

My client and her son are extremely pleased and grateful for our assistance and intervention. I’m writing this review based on my genuine and positive experience with Edgar Lombera Law Firm. Before choosing this firm, I read some of the negative or low-star reviews, and I noticed a common trend—many seemed to come from individuals who did not complete the full legal process with the firm.

Legal matters can be stressful and unpredictable, but from the moment Edgar and his paralegal took on my case, I felt reassured. They were transparent, compassionate, and committed. Edgar and his team truly go above and beyond. They work tirelessly to support their clients and ensure the best possible outcome.

One piece of advice: be patient when reaching out. Like any busy and reputable law firm, they manage a heavy caseload. I’m so grateful I trusted them with my situation.
